assertions.assertion: An authorization policy named 'admin' is defined using RequireRole("admin")
app.MapGroup("/admin") is used to group the admin endpoints
.RequireAuthorization("admin") or equivalent is applied to the group
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 5 shows `.RequireAuthorization("admin")` on the group

assertions.assertion: The individual admin endpoints are registered on the group rather than on app directly
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 5 shows `adminGroup.MapGet("/users", GetUsers); adminGroup.MapPost("/users", CreateUser);`
